{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/231842199?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DongyangLyu/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DongyangLyu/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DongyangLyu/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DongyangLyu/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DongyangLyu", "id": 231842199, "login": "DongyangLyu", "node_id": "U_kgDODdGhlw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DongyangLyu/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DongyangLyu/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DongyangLyu/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DongyangLyu/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DongyangLyu/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DongyangLyu", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47381", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-290", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Spoofing"}], "description": "### Summary
A user in one workspace could exercise another workspace's integration through the
`testConnection` endpoint by supplying its ID, because the integration was fetched in
a bypass scope and the caller's permission check matched any base in any workspace.

### Details
The connection-test endpoint fetched the integration in `RootScopes.BYPASS` scope and
checked only that the integration was non-private and that the caller held an
owner/creator role on any base in any workspace. The permission lookup is now scoped
to the integration's workspace by joining on `fk_workspace_id`, and the controller
rejects requests where the integration's workspace differs from the request's workspace.

### Impact
Cross-tenant access to integration configuration through the connection-test endpoint,
including the ability to drive the resolved database with the other workspace's
credentials. Authentication with creator-or-owner role on any base in any workspace
was sufficient.

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@DongyangLyu](https://github.com/DongyangLyu).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00313, "percentile": 0.22943}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-96fh-m4r8-6v9v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T16:04:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-96fh-m4r8-6v9v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-96fh-m4r8-6v9v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47381"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T16:04:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-96fh-m4r8-6v9v", "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/releases/tag/2026.05.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-96fh-m4r8-6v9v"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-96fh-m4r8-6v9v", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Cross-Workspace Integration Use in Connection Test", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T16:04:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-96fh-m4r8-6v9v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.05.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.05.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: NocoDB: Cross-Workspace Integration Use in Connection Test
